b1507eed85cd.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
b1507eed85cd.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
b1507eed85cd.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

17d104ab5a9b.title: Close the hygiene gap — 4 to 5
17d104ab5a9b.description: An FSA rating of 4 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
17d104ab5a9b.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

4798a27bc06a.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
4798a27bc06a.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

a0ef51c79395.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
a0ef51c79395.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
a0ef51c79395.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

2dcacba825ef.title: Guest experience outpaces formal trust record
2dcacba825ef.description: Guests enjoy the venue but the compliance record hasn't kept up. One poor inspection would make a private gap public. The fix is proactive compliance work, not more marketing.
2dcacba825ef.expected_upside: Close the gap before it becomes visible

5f4e09ea7995.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
5f4e09ea7995.description: You trail peers by 1.6 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

4f062ce8ad7c.title: Protect the 4.6/5 rating — it took years to build
4f062ce8ad7c.description: With 1034 reviews at 4.6/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
